message:
fix(mux): fix font size actions and keyboard shortcuts with Alt modifier

- Use ghostty-compatible action strings (increase_font_size:1,
  decrease_font_size:1, reset_font_size) instead of zoom-in/out/reset
- Use e.code instead of e.key for Alt-modified shortcuts (quick terminal,
  inspector) since Alt produces dead keys on macOS
- Change quick terminal shortcut from ⌥⌘` to ⌥⌘\ to avoid OS conflict
